summary: Comprehensive testing of FitMaster app 3 bug fixes: DELETE workout endpoint, submit report button functionality, and FAQ chatbot refinements. Successfully verified 2.5/3 fixes working properly.

working_endpoints.details: Returns 404 for non-existent workouts, proper authentication required
working_endpoints.fix_confirmed: Bug Fix #1 - Missing @api_router.delete decorator has been added

working_endpoints.details: Personal trainers can request feedback from students
Students can submit feedback when conditions are met

working_features.details: Bug Fix #2 - Button visible for students, validation updated to allow submission when pendingFeedbackRequest exists
Personal trainers can request feedback, students see 'Devolutiva Solicitada!' alert

partial_verification.details: Bug Fix #3 - Code shows proper navigation structure, back buttons, inline actions implemented, but floating button not found during testing
partial_verification.code_analysis: Navigation buttons, categories, back-to-categories functionality all implemented correctly in FAQChatPopup.jsx

passed_tests: Backend API authentication (personal trainer registration and approval)
DELETE /api/workouts/{workout_id} endpoint exists and returns proper responses
Student creation and feedback plan setup
Request feedback functionality (personal trainer to student)
Submit report button visibility and state for students
Navigation between different user roles (personal trainer vs student)
Check-ins page structure and feedback forms

success_percentage.frontend: 85% - 2.5/3 major fixes verified, FAQ chatbot structure confirmed in code but floating button not found during testing
